title: Xtra Fluffy Uruguayan Rigatoni Pasta
description: A fermented and fluffy pasta dish featuring rigatoni, inspired by Uruguayan cuisine, with a macrobiotic-friendly twist. This dish is perfect for a special occasion or a cozy night in.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the rigatoni according to package instructions, then set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the minced garlic and chopped onion until softened.
Add the fermented vegetable broth, dried oregano, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the broth mixture to a simmer and let cook for 10 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked rigatoni, broth mixture, and grated Parmesan cheese, if using.
Transfer the rigatoni mixture to a baking dish and dehydrate in the oven for 20 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with additional Parmesan cheese if desired.
